title: SUMMER CAMPS - 211info
text: SOUTHERN OREGON UNIVERSITY SUMMER CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides day and overnight youth camps. 1250 Siskiyou Boulevard Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Most activities are for childen in grades 5-11 Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Camps: Varies by camp Email (541) 552-6452 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 552-7672 Main phone Main phone (541) 552-6452 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - SOUTHERN OREGON UNIVERSITY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
